documents.title: Synthetic measurement note
documents.text: This synthetic source records that Synthetic public policy question is evaluated with an explicit method, defined scope, and reproducible observations. The shared fictional metric is 10 units, which is intentionally included only to exercise contradiction handling in acceptance tests.
